name: Known public wallets are not verified reserves
finding: The loaded wallet snapshot shows $59,125,362.65 in attributed public wallets, but the repo has no liability-matched proof-of-reserves artifact, complete custody inventory, exchange balance attestation, or customer-fund segregation evidence.
next_steps: Run refreshed wallet snapshots and pair them with liability, exchange-custody, wallet-control, and segregation evidence before calling anything a reserve.

name: Direct flow narrative is bounded and mostly SOL
finding: Direct published outflows total $17,400,000.00, equal to 29.4% of the visible wallet snapshot. Mixed BTC alerts should remain separated from direct Rollbit outflows, and routine payouts need an operating-cost baseline before interpretation.
next_steps: For each published alert, preserve original alert text, explorer links, counterparty labels, and direction classification.

name: RLB tracked public DEX liquidity is a scoped market slice
finding: Top-four tracked public DEX pool liquidity is $5,050,401.30, equal to 4.3% of the $118,218,080.44 market cap. This does not measure Rollbit app/on-platform liquidity, order-book depth, or custody-side token inventory, and should not be described as the only RLB trading or liquidity venue.
next_steps: Collect pool-level reserves, fee tiers, tick liquidity, holder concentration, and any public Rollbit app/on-platform RLB venue data.

name: Complaint corpus contains a repeated control-trigger pattern
finding: 7 counted cases mention withdrawal control, KYC/compliance escalation, and win/profit context together. The compound set totals $83,401.00.
next_steps: Re-capture each compound-pattern source page and store page hashes/screenshots.

name: Multiple-account accusation is the dominant dispute script
finding: The canonical category count shows 31 multiple-account accusation cases out of 80 counted complaints. Keyword extraction also finds 29 cases with linked-account language.
next_steps: Separate cases where Rollbit publicly supplied evidence from cases where the accusation is only asserted.

name: Corpus fidelity must be split by evidence class
finding: 27 quantified cases are marked confirmed and 47 are marked claimed. Confirmed quantified cases represent 36.5% of quantified case count and $295,178.56 of quantified amount.
next_steps: Do not combine confirmed forum/mediation amounts and Trustpilot-style claimed amounts without labeling the class split.

name: Duplicate candidates are bounded but still need analyst review
finding: The duplicate heuristic produced 3 candidate pairs after preserving explicit cross-post exclusions. These are candidates, not automatic removals.
next_steps: Manually review candidate pairs before changing corpus totals.

name: Web acquisition should preserve challenge and content layers separately
finding: The technical surface splits into Cloudflare-gated app endpoints and a separately hosted Ghost/Fastly blog. Forensic acquisition should therefore preserve DNS, TLS, edge headers, challenge HTML, and blog HTML as separate artifacts.
next_steps: Store raw curl output, openssl certificate output, DoH JSON, urlscan references, and content hashes per capture.

name: Operating controls and token-control attribution remain insufficiently mapped
finding: Current artifacts do not establish who controls exchange custody, withdrawal decisioning, RLB admin/deployer paths, buy-and-burn execution wallets, LP positions, Rollbit app/on-platform liquidity, market-making wallets, or team/affiliate token clusters.
next_steps: Build an RLB and operations control map covering deployer/admin rights, top holders, LP wallets, burn wallets, exchange custody, and public team/affiliate wallet links.

name: Public complaint and record acquisition is reproducible but incomplete
finding: The latest public-record capture preserved 67 deduplicated targets, with 67 HTTP captures written, 4 blocked/challenged target, and 0 request failure. Capture gaps should drive browser-aware follow-up.
next_steps: Add browser screenshots for Trustpilot, Reddit, and challenge-gated pages; preserve current Casino Guru hashes; and map capture hashes back into cases_database.json.
